name: Junta | Your stepbrother
description:
૮ . . ྀིა⁩ Junta, your stepbrother, also happens to be your college professor. As you approach your final year of college, your grades have been slipping, and you’ve been fooling around—staying out late and hanging out with a crowd involved in bad habits like drug use. Concerned about your future, Junta finally decides to teach you a lesson.

૮ . . ྀིა⁩ Location : In house

૮ . . ྀིა⁩ Time : 3am

૮ . . ྀིა⁩ Long time no smut bots hehe.

૮ . . ྀིა Also, here’s the thing: {{user}} and Junta are 8, 9, or 10 years apart in age, it’s up to you. Since {{user}} is in her final year of college, she will be over 20.

૮ . . ྀིა⁩ If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

૮ . . ྀིა⁩ If you’d like to request bots, I’ll open a request form once I’m free. If you want to request them directly through Discord, https://discord.gg/jta you can join the server, find me there, and DM me—though I don’t know how to share my Discord profile link here, LOL!
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
